title: ayenia laevigata
intro: Ayenia laevigata, also known as the smooth ayenia, is a flowering plant species in the Apocynaceae family. It is native to tropical regions of Central and South America, and its leaves and stems are used for medicinal purposes. The medicinal properties of Ayenia laevigata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and supporting immune function.
